title: 『オペレーション：ダンスフィーバー』

text_block_list.text:
On our way home from a day out, we see a huge
crowd gathered in front of an arcade.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Cause of congestion—AR Dance Game.
Eighty-five percent of students in class bring it up
in conversation.
choice_data_list: Want to give it a try?
Want to give it a try?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Yes, but it's a two-player competitive game. I can
see that you're tired from work, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Based on these factors, I believe we should try at
a later—

Beep, beep, beep! Anomaly detected on the class
representative radar! You two must be in some
kind of trouble!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Approaching target identified. Is something the
matter, Bakushin O?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
As an exemplary class representative, it goes
without saying that I'm even on the lookout for
students in need after school!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
And so, I heard the cry from deep in your heart
and came running!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
It was shouting, "Oh, how I want someone to play
the dance game with me!"

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
A voice from my heart... That is incorrect. No
brain waves have been transmitted.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
However, I've identified a "stroke of luck." A
worthy opponent has been acquired.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Proceeding to song selection. Your orders,
Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Something cool... My classmates have used this
word in contexts such as "finishing a song on max
difficulty would be so cool."

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I propose that we set the difficulty level to the
highest.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
As an honor student, it is my mission never to shy
away from a challenge! I accept your request!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Arrived at AR area. Commencing dance battle.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant... Haaah, haaah...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Ho, ho, not bad! But I'm not about to
lo—WHAT?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
GRRR! This machine just can't keep up with my
incredible speed! It must be a design flaw!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
The results will remain unknown until the end.
Pressing score display button.
Click... Beep... Bzzzt!

text_block_list.name: Employee
text_block_list.text:
Aieee! Why's there smoke coming out of the
machine?! Wait... the data's getting erased too?!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
...Visual confirmation of equipment failure. Score
erasure confirmed.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: What?!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Mission failed. The machine broke down because
I touched it... My sincere apologies, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
That's right! It's about feeling, spirit, and guts! In
other words... I definitely got a perfect score!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: If it's about feeling, then...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Trainer, how did my dance make you feel?
choice_data_list: I thought it was the coolest thing ever!
I thought it was the coolest thing ever!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: The coolest thing ever...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Wonderful! My duty as class representative has
been fulfilled!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Heh... Indeed. Mission complete.

Thus, the heated dance battle ends with both
participants as winners!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Understood. I will select an exciting song.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I'm the class favorite! If you want something
exciting, look no further! I'll take you on!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Arrived at AR area. Commencing dance battle.

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
Wow, those two are really into it! Seeing them
makes me want to dance, too!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Indoor temperature rising. More people than
anticipated have gathered.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Yeeeaah! We're heating up now! I'm feeling it!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Trainer's words of encouragement received.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Now, here comes the chorus! Come on, Bourbon!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Understood. Setting engines to maximum power!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant... Game complete. I expended all my energy.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
That was so amazing! We were on fire! You get
my ultimate seal of approval!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Did you like it, Trainer?
choice_data_list: It got me really fired up!
It got me really fired up!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Thank you very much. It was all thanks to you.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Your cheers lifted my mood and boosted my
performance.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
You could even say that I was "into it." This
moment has been recorded in my memory logs.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Well, I love the sound of that! Looks like my work
here as class representative is finished!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Heh... Indeed. Mission complete.

Thus, the heated dance battle ends with both
participants feeling exhilarated!
